productDisplayName: Fila Men's Dna Lite Black Blue Shoe
description: The DNA Light collection is an ideal combination between a technical training shoe and a great performance, extraordinary reactivity and low profile footwear. The result is this shoe! With a transpiring flow system and super action technology for maximum amortisation, the DNA Lite features an ultra light nylon air mesh upper with thermo-welded applications for optimal foot support. Upper Mesh upper  for extremely lightweight comfort and breathability Suede overlays around the central lacing for extra durability and midfoot structure Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Lushly padded collar for snug comfort Brand name appliquéd in fibre outside the heel cup for style Carbon rubber outsole extended and embedded onto the toe box Midsole Super action midsole and features additional super action inserts in the heel for increased responsiveness fila DLS technology throughout the midsole for extreme lightweight function leading to maximum performance fila performance footbed with anti-microbial properties for superior comfort and health Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Outsole made of evergrind rubber which comes with a 7-month guarantee Has a 3 Action system a soft polymer in the heel for shock absorption, providing increased rear-foot cushioning Midfoot shank containing grooves for added arch support Scooped heel for better cushioning Shoe careDo not machine washWipe surface with a dampl, clean cloth to remmove dustStore away from sunlight
